narration: What if I told you some creatures wear the same dangerous costume?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if I told you some creatures wear the same dangerous costume?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you some creatures wear the same dangerous costume?

narration: This is called Mullerian mimicry—where harmful species share similar warning signals.
visual_description: Context visual: This is called Mullerian mimicry—where harmful species share similar warning signals.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: This is called Mullerian mimicry—where harmful species share similar warning signals.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: This is called Mullerian mimicry—where harmful species share similar warning signals.

narration: This strategy benefits them all. Predators learn to avoid their shared colors!
visual_description: Escalation visual: This strategy benefits them all. Predators learn to avoid their shared colors!
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: This strategy benefits them all. Predators learn to avoid their shared colors!
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: This strategy benefits them all. Predators learn to avoid their shared colors!

narration: Examples? Think of butterflies, wasps, and even some frogs—all sharing bright warning patterns.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Examples? Think of butterflies, wasps, and even some frogs—all sharing bright warning patterns.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Examples? Think of butterflies, wasps, and even some frogs—all sharing bright warning patterns.

narration: But here's the twist—this mimicry isn't always perfect. Uncertainty lurks in nature!
